purpose: Estructura tematica para SM Manager. Cada subtopic se traduce en uno o mas records (Posts/Reels/Videos) por SM Manager batch semanal. Funnel stages: TOFU (awareness), MOFU (consideration), BOFU (decision). Theme codes T1-T5 son visual themes en Director v2/Creativo (T1=Dark Premium default educational, T2=White Clean data, T3=Gold Black urgency, T4=Soft Cream testimonio, T5=Vibrant Blue engagement).
